business_proof_points: The user is evaluating Vulca as a design-to-production presentation workflow, not a prompt-only slide generator.
The first read must show a product-system promise before any trace detail appears.
The launch story must avoid source-brand imitation while still feeling like a real commercial product reveal.
forbidden_evidence_substitutes: decorative icon standing in for a product state
content_density_checks: at least three role-specific evidence objects are visible
at least two proof objects can be inspected without reading notes
business proof points are paraphrased into native editable text
evidence objects support the commercial decision rather than internal process reporting
